name: What common mistakes derail workplace lung exposure claims?
description: Delay, no docs, solo insurer talks—get lawyer.[2]

mainEntity.name: What common mistakes derail workplace lung exposure claims?

acceptedAnswer.text: Delay, no docs, solo insurer talks—get lawyer.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Delaying medical care, missing deadlines, talking to adjusters alone**, or not documenting exposure.[2]

Assuming no case without accident.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Poor records
- Signing releases early
- Ignoring appeals

**Practical guidance:** Lawyer from day 1; track everything.
Avoid these pitfalls.
